allow: Bash(uv --project collection-system run python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv, find_dotenv; load_dotenv\(find_dotenv\(usecwd=True\)\); from collection_system.infra.config import Settings; s = Settings\(\); print\('groq:', bool\(s.groq_api_key\), 'cerebras:', bool\(s.cerebras_api_key\), 'model:', s.cerebras_model\)")
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "pg: %{http_code} \(postgres doesn't speak http; use psql test below\)\\n" http://localhost:5432)

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 30032,11080 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name='python.exe'\\" | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 33508,32600 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; 'python procs:'; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name='python.exe'\\" | Measure-Object\).Count; 'curl procs:'; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name='curl.exe'\\" | Measure-Object\).Count")
Bash(VIRTUAL_ENV='D:/Collection System/orchestrator/.venv' uv pip install accelerate)
Bash(VIRTUAL_ENV='D:/Collection System/orchestrator/.venv' uv run --active pytest tests/unit -x -q)
Bash("D:/Collection System/orchestrator/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import openai; print\('openai', openai.__version__\); from openai import AsyncOpenAI, RateLimitError; print\('AsyncOpenAI OK'\)")

Bash("D:/Collection System/orchestrator/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "from collection_system.adapters.llm.openai_adapter import OpenAIAdapter; from collection_system.bootstrap import _build_llm_provider; from collection_system.infra.config import Settings; s = Settings\(LLM_PROVIDER='openai', OPENAI_API_KEY='sk-test'\); a = _build_llm_provider\(s, 'openai'\); print\('built:', type\(a\).__name__, a._model\)")

Bash("D:/Collection System/orchestrator/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "from collection_system.infra.config import Settings; from collection_system.bootstrap import build_llm; s = Settings\(\); print\('provider:', s.llm_provider\); print\('model:', s.openai_model\); print\('key set:', bool\(s.openai_api_key\)\); a = build_llm\(s\); print\('adapter:', type\(a\).__name__\)")

Bash("D:/Collection System/orchestrator/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import inspect; from collection_system.infra.config import Settings; print\('has customise:', hasattr\(Settings, 'settings_customise_sources'\)\); print\(inspect.getsource\(Settings.settings_customise_sources\)\)")

Bash("D:/Collection System/orchestrator/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "from collection_system.infra.config import Settings; s = Settings\(\); print\('max_depth:', s.max_depth\); print\('max_queries:', s.max_queries\); print\('relevance_threshold:', s.relevance_threshold\); print\('per_url_timeout_s:', s.per_url_timeout_s\)")
